pageTitle: Do you want to upload files?
caption: Resolve a property dispute
heading: Do you want to upload files to support your counterclaim?
paragraph1: Witness statements do not need to be uploaded at this stage, directions for the exchange of witness statements will be given later.
paragraph2: The claimant will be able to see these files.
